zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford於1164年之後出生在英國艾可時，他的父親Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford8889歲，母親Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford8875歲。他於1207年與Isabel de Bolebec結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年10月25日之前在英國艾可可爾內 恩蓋，埋葬在英國奧可福爾奧可福德克里斯蒂 邱奇 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Vere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name, mostly from Vair in Ancenis, named with Gaulish ver(n)- ‘alder’. This was the probable home in the 11th century of the Breton lord Aubrey (Albericus) de Ver, who followed William the Conqueror to England and founded an influential family who held the earldom of Oxford until 1703. In a few cases the surname could be from other places in France, such as Ver in Manche and Calvados, which have the same etymology as Vair.
French (mainy Vendée; Veré): variant of Vairé, from Old French vairie ‘variegated, spotted’, applied as a nickname for someone who has freckles.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford was born after 1164, in Essex, England, his father, Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford, was 8889 and his mother, Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford, was 8875. He married Isabel de Bolebec in 1207. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 4 daughters. He died before 25 October 1221, in Colne Engaine, Essex, England, and was buried in Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, England.

Il a épousé Isabel de Bolebec en 1207. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé avant 25 octobre 1221, à Colne Engaine, Essex, Angleterre, et a été enterré à Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford(이)가 1164년 이후 영국 에세스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford(은)는 8889세였고, 그의 어머니 Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford(은)는 8875세였다. 그는 1207년 Isabel de Bolebec(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 10월 25일 이전 영국 에세스 코니 잉가인에서 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 스퍼드 크리스트 처르치 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford nasceu após 1164, em Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford, tinha 8889 anos e sua mãe, Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford, tinha 8875 anos. Ele casou-se com Isabel de Bolebec em 1207. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu antes 25 de outubro de 1221, em Colne Engaine, Essex, Inglaterra, e foi sepultado em Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Christ Church Cathedral, Oxford, Oxfords: краист чурч кэтедраль, оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Vere 3rd Earl of Oxford родился после 1164 г. в местности эссекс, Англия, его отцу по имени Aubrey de Vere 1st Earl of Oxford было 8889 лет, а матери, которую звали Agnes Lucy Countess of Oxford, 8875. Он женился на женщине по имени Isabel de Bolebec в 1207 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер перед 25 октябрь 1221 г. в местности колн энгеин, эссекс, Англия и был похоронен в местности краист чурч кэтедраль, оксфорд, оксфордшир, Англия.
